title: Closing the polygon — Confirm selection button visible
capture_instructions: The polygon has just been closed (either by clicking the first vertex or pressing Enter). The polygon outline is now a closed shape. The points inside the polygon are highlighted yellow. A 'Confirm selection' button overlay is visible in the 3D viewport (typically bottom-center or lower-right corner of the viewport). The class picker may also be starting to appear.
ui_state: Polygon mode, polygon closed, points inside highlighted yellow, Confirm button visible

annotations.label: Enter also closes and confirms the polygon
